item.title: Fuck grades... Encourage kids no matter what a simple test says... STEM are amazing, and all brains work differently, if there's a spark, a passion, encourage it!!

item.title: Tru dat.
item.description:
wat. Imagine the first person who found a dinosaur skeleton...
Trees, are..modern? This is false news because everyone knows that mesas are really just large trees cut down, and then petrified.
I looked it up. I thought it was the African black-footed cat (only 60%). But...but the dragonfly. 97% kill rate. Damn. The only thing I can do 97% of the time successfully is fall unconscious every night.
Let's hope they don't organize.
Great, now I gotta look up interspatial voltair.
item.dc:creator: Viscouse

item.title: To shreds you say?
item.description:
Nonono.
Take care. Onelove.
item.dc:creator: Bruskey

item.title: Memes vol 663
item.description:
Well well well if it isn’t the scissoring sisters. Hey isn’t that that band. Well well well if it isn’t the cunnilingus cousins- no I’ve gotta stop here
Why is the text so bright
Have you seen the interviews where they ask the cast who’s the most similar to their character and they all say him. That’s scary. He is genuinely terrifying and I think he uses that to his advantage. But he doesn’t look as scary blonde so theres that.
My boyfriend was making small talk with this guy we worked with and they were talking about what kind of music they liked. My boyfriend said he liked rap and this guy responded “Oh no I hate rap. It’s not real music” so my boyfriend asked if he liked Eminem and he said “oh I love Eminem.”
Flat Bruce and Fat Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Chris Hayes: "Donald Trump has once again found the worst possible sustainable equilibrium. This is what he does, just short of the worst-case scenario, then he wants credit. Sends us on a course for catastrophe, then a step away from it – I've solved it"

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Friday everyone, we're excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Kevin and his tongue are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 300 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 350 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th by @OP 430 9th, 10th and 11th by Pizza Angel @ImChangingMyUsername 500 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th by @OP 630 16th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 700 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 715 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd by @OP 730 Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 800 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @gablestout 800 27th, 28th, 29th and 30th by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 550 1st by Grocery Angel @pot314 650 2nd by Grocery Angel @noroutesfound 3rd and 4th by Grocery Angel @Eisingrumble
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Inherited memes pt 46
item.description:
What strain was it?
The T in t pain stands for tolkien
A funky crown
Birds are beautiful in their natural habitat
Sky's the limit. Just gotta learn to lift your forks
Gotta add a few more on there
The woes of being a cool cat. My zoomies are conspiracies I'm theorizing
Crazy how many cultures have someone taking fire and giving it to humans
Just trying to cuddle and go thru all the memes on my phone is that too much to ask!?
It's not easy out here
item.dc:creator: TheDiscovererOfMemes

item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: im just trying to not cook dinner
item.description: Just called my local Donatos. Instead of the local person answering I get an AI agent for the first time. It never got my name correct. Ive been ordering from this same Donatos for 15 years. Regularly. They have my information and the goddamn phone number I call from. I liked that I could call and order. That works out for them cuz I’m not patrolling their app / website for discounts. The clanker fucked up my name. Not even close. I even spelled my name for the boy. Still wrong. I had to repeat my order FOUR goddamn times. I’m guessing it’s going to be fucked up. My child is going to pick up the supposed order. I told them that it’s under the wrong name and to check the pies. If it’s messed up they can just leave. My bank will fix it. Dear Jane Grote Abell, chairwoman of Donatos and part of the “founding family”. Stop using AI. It’s not ready for customer service without human intervention. I’m GenX but I guess I sound like a Boomer. I just want to call. Well, back to life. My best friend’s dad just died. Going to check on them.
item.dc:creator: lurkyloos

item.title: Well I am surprised
item.description: Not that surprised, ok I kind of don’t care what happens to her. WOW front page! I read this in News Week this morning. She was saying all this in an interview with Tomi Lauren I don’t really understand the expectation there. It’s mind boggling the self serving attitude of GOP stooges. Thanks for the up votes
item.dc:creator: wedorecover

24

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @legendof7essa painted these trees. Great work! Check their posts for a few others.
27 Man Tax: Logan Macrae
“I love deadlines. I like the whooshing sound they make as they fly by.” - Douglas Adams So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Playing the chicken!
item.description: Does anyone know the term for the printed "sheet music" he's using? I can't think of if. Often used in nickelodeons and player pianos.
